---
id: list-outgoing-webhook-deliveries
title: "Get a list of outgoing webhook deliveries"
description: "Gives back the list of outgoing webhook deliveries associated with the given webhook configuration."
sidebar_label: "Get a list of outgoing webhook deliveries"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/release-management/api-reference/release-management-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Gets a list of outgoing webhook deliveries."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/outgoing-webhooks/{id}/deliveries"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gives back the list of outgoing webhook deliveries associated with the given webhook configuration.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
